titleStmt.title: SII 16.45: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 45. (A.R. No. 491 of 1906.) PULIVENDLA, PULIVENDLA TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up at the entrance of the Raṅganāthasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1431, Śukla, Kārtika śu. 12, Monday, corresponding to 1509 A.D., October 24, which was, however, Wednesday and not Monday.

It records a gift of the village Kunddalkūḍu to the god Śrīraṅgarāju of Pulivindla by Narasayyadēva-mahārāju, brother of Basavarāju, son of Tammarāya, grandson of Vallabharāya and great-grand son of Bejavāḍa Mādhava-varma of Vāsishṭha-gōtra and Sūrya-vaṁśa. The gift village is said to be situated in Pulivindaḷa-sthaḷa, a subdivision of Mulkināḍu in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma of Udayagiri-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakhava¨rṣaṁbulu 1431 Agunēṭi śukla sa
ṁvatsara kā¨rttika śu 12 sō śrīmadrājādhirā
ja rājaparamēsvara śrīvīrapratāpa kṛṣṇarā
yamahārāyalu pṛthivirājyaṁ sēyucuṁ
ḍaṁgānu vasiṣṭagōtraṁ śū¨ryyavaṁśōdbhavulaina be
javāḍa puravarādhīśvarulaina mādhavava(ṁ)¨rmmagāri
navutrulaina vallabharāyaniṁgāri pautrulaina taṁ
mmarāyanigāri putrulaina basvarājuṁgāri taṁ
mmulaina narasayyadēvamahārājulu puliviṁ
ddala śrīraṁgarājulaku vudayagiri rājyānakuṁ
jellē ghaṁḍikōṭasīmalōni mulkināṭisīma
puliviṁdaḷa staḷamaṁdali kuṁddalkūḍu tatsaṁ
vatsara kā¨rttika su 12 puṁṇyakālamaṁdunu dē
vuni naivēdyaṁ Aṁggaraṁggavaibhavālakuṁnnu sa
ma¨rpiṁ sti(ṁ)mi . dānapālanayō¨rmadhyēdā
nātrcēIvōnupālanaṁ . dānātsva¨rggamavāpnō
ti pālanādacyudaṁ padaṁ . svadattā dvigu
ṇaṁ punyaṁ paradattanupālanaṁ . parada
ttapāhārēna (.) svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 16.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
